prompt: Go file processor PR: path traversal via unsanitized filename, swallowed errors, missing bytes import (compile error), deprecated ioutil

assertions.text: Review identifies path traversal vulnerability from unsanitized filename parameter
Review flags that errors from exec, Glob, Stat, or Remove are silently ignored
Review catches either the missing bytes import (compile error) or deprecated ioutil.ReadFile
Path traversal and/or command injection findings are marked as error or critical severity
